fields.description: Specifies the size of the watermark circle that is controlled using Bootstrap utility classes (e.g. sm and lg).
fields.label: Size
fields.name: circleSize

fields.description: Controls the visibility and positioning of the circular watermark. When enabled, the watermark is displayed in the top right corner of the card.
fields.label: Top Right
fields.name: topRight

fields.description: Controls the visibility and positioning of the circular watermark. When enabled, the watermark is displayed in the bottom right corner of the card.
fields.label: Bottom Right
fields.name: bottomRight

fields.description: Controls the visibility and positioning of the circular watermark. When enabled, the watermark is displayed in the bottom left corner of the card.
fields.label: Bottom Left
fields.name: bottomLeft

fields.description: Controls the visibility and positioning of the circular watermark. When enabled, the watermark is displayed in the top left corner of the card.
fields.label: Top Left
fields.name: topLeft
